title: Being able to mirror conversations
excerpt: I agree it doesn’t make sense that I can mirror any field except the conversation field.  I also have not found a way to mirror the first field (item 1) field.  Any ideas much appreciated.

posts.author: tcp27 (Todd Palmer)
